text:
Susan Giuliano <susang@sbei.com> has also requested that the entry "LAN Media
Corporation" on our commercial/hardware page be removed. It is redudant
information given the restructuring done via PR docs/24794
(http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=24794). The patch attached will
accomplish the deletia required.

How-To-Repeat: 
 N/A
